notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper collision detection, speed scaling, lives, scoring, pause, and audio; minor visual simplicity (square ball, no rounded bricks) keeps it from a perfect score.
Excellent implementation with solid collision detection, audio, and visuals, but lacks delta time so game speed is tied to monitor refresh rate.

A solid and complete Breakout clone with working paddle/ball/brick logic and states, but it is fairly barebones and likely has occasional collision edge cases rather than flawless arcade-quality behavior.
